name: Blueberry Swirl Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first three ingredients (graham cracker crumbs, 1 cup sugar, and 3 tablespoons sugar) in a bowl and mix well.
2. Press the mixture into the bottom and up the sides of a 9-inch spring form pan. Set aside.
3. In a large mixing bowl, beat the cream cheese with an electric mixer until light and fluffy.
4. Gradually add 1 cup sugar to the cream cheese, mixing well after each addition.
5. Add one egg at a time, beating well after each addition.
6. Stir in 1 teaspoon vanilla extract.
7. Pour half of the batter into the prepared pan.
8. Spoon the blueberry pie filling over the batter in a ring pattern about halfway from the edge of the cake. Do not spoon too much filling; use only half the can and reserve the rest for topping individual slices.
8. Finish by adding the remaining 1/2 cup of batter to the pan.
9. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 30 minutes.
10. Let cool to room temperature on a wire rack, then refrigerate for 12 hours.
11. Remove the sides of the pan before serving.
